---
title: "Slide"
format: html
---

# CytometryInR

- Since February, we have been offering a free weekly Cytometry in R course, offered in person and online via YouTube. It is aimed at those with prior cytometry experience, but no to little coding experience. 

- All code and recordings are available online, and will remain freely available after course wraps. 

- We hope this will make others self-learning journeys far smoother than the one we had to experience when first getting started.
